creator: rk@ronald.org
text:
On Tuesday, August 01, 2006 at 10:20:17 CEST, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of x11-toolkits/ocaml-lablgtk,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/101144 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/101144

Hi,

I approve the submitted changes. It would be fine with me
if Stanislav Sedov takes over maintainership of this port
if he likes.

Regards,
  Ronald
